text:
On my system with motherboard ASRock 4CoreN73PV-HD720p (chipset nForce
630i) to SATA-controller in compatable mode connect 2 HHDs and 2 optical
drives. On installing process from optical drive I configure HDDs but
when it's needed choose installation media, system make message about
that she is not found optical drives on my system.

Fix: 

I don't know.
How-To-Repeat: I don't know.
